title: Toolkit for educators: Activities for ages 4 to 6 - Canada.ca
content:
Canada's food guide kids

## Toolkit for educators: Activities for ages 4 to 6
These activities are intended for children aged 4 to 6 years old. They will help them:
- name different foods
- group different foods
- use their senses to identify foods
These activities support children in experiencing and exploring foods which are part of Canada’s food guide.
Explore veggies and fruits
SENSE-sational foods
Food scramble and sort
Additional Learning activities
- Toolkit for educators
For recipes and more food guide resources visit: Canada.ca/FoodGuide
